title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers video demonstrates building AI agents using the open-source Strands Agents SDK, showing how agent loops work through progressive examples from single-tool to multi-agent orchestrators. The video emphasizes that agents are fundamentally loops where a model reasons, selects tools, executes them, and repeats until completion.
